title: Add Observability to Your Next.js App
description: Complete observability route — product analytics with PostHog and error monitoring with Sentry. Covers user tracking, custom events, feature flags, error capture, and performance tracing.

steps.description: Set up PostHog for product analytics: pageview tracking, custom events, user identification, and feature flags
Set up Sentry for error monitoring: automatic error capture, performance tracing, source maps, and release tracking
